title: All Of Utility 2
description: Redstone tech, carpet+addons, exploration, visual, QOL, building tools.
body:
# All of Utility 2 - Client Utility Modpack

**All of Utility 2** is a continuously updated, client-side–focused utility modpack for advanced survival, technical gameplay, building, and multiplayer servers.  
It is **not tied to a single Minecraft version** and has been maintained across multiple game releases.

---

## ⚠️ Project Status & New Version

**All of Utility 2 is no longer actively maintained.**

- The project has moved to a new, updated version:  
  ## ➡️ [All of Utility 3](https://modrinth.com/modpack/allofutility3)

- Starting from version **26.1.2 and above**, all future development continues on the new page.

- **All of Utility 2 remains functional** on the Minecraft versions it originally supported, but it will **no longer receive updates or new features**.

---

## 🎯 Intended Audience

- Technical and redstone-focused players  
- Builders working on large-scale projects  
- Multiplayer players who rely on advanced client tools  
- Players who want a **powerful but configurable** client setup  

---

## 🔄 Versioning & World Rendering

- The modpack exists in **multiple Minecraft versions**
- World-rendering mods depend on the Minecraft version:
  - **Older versions:** Bobby *and/or* Voxy
  - **Minecraft 1.21.11+:** **Voxy only**
- Rendering mods are selected to ensure best compatibility and performance per version

---

## ⚡ Performance & Optimization

Focused on high FPS, low latency, and efficient memory usage:
- Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Krypton
- Entity Culling, More Culling, ImmediatelyFast
- Dynamic FPS, GPU Tape, Nvidium (when supported)

---

## 🗺️ Exploration, Maps & Navigation

Advanced tools for exploration and multiplayer coordination:
- Xaero’s Minimap & World Map (+ XaeroPlus)
- Waypoints, direction helpers, client-side map utilities
- Extended render distance via Bobby or Voxy (depending on version)

---

## 🧱 Building, Redstone & Technical Gameplay

Strong focus on technical Minecraft and redstone work:
- Litematica (+ optional printers)
- Tweakeroo, Tweakermore, MiniHUD, ItemScroller, ChunkDebug
- Carpet and multiple Carpet-based additions
- WorldEdit (client-side usage)
- Axiom, DBTools, Chunk utilities

---

## 🎨 Visual Enhancements
Visual upgrades without sacrificing performance:
- Not Enough Animations
- Entity Texture & Model Features
- Continuity, Better Clouds, Smooth Skies
- Skin Layers 3D, Wavey Capes
- Ambient Environment, particle and lighting improvements

---

## 🔊 Audio & Immersion
Enhanced spatial and environmental sound:
- Presence Footsteps
- Sound Physics Remastered
- Drip Sounds
- AudioPlayer
- Ambient and environmental audio mods

---

## 🎙️ Multiplayer & Server Interaction

- Simple Voice Chat + voice-related extensions
- Replay Mod (+ voice integration)
- Many mods **unlock additional features when corresponding server mods are installed**
- Designed to integrate smoothly with modded or semi-modded servers

---

## 🔀 Modular & Flexible Design

- Some mods are **disabled by default**
- Alternatives are included where possible
- Players can switch between mods to:
  - Gain specific functionality
  - Avoid conflicts
  - Match server rules or personal preferences

---

## ⚠️ Important Notice

> **WARNING:**  
> This modpack contains **client-side utilities that may be considered cheating** on some servers  
> (e.g. Litematica, MiniHUD, Tweakeroo, Carpet-based features).

---

## ✅ Server Compatibility

- **Allowed on Mainstay SMP**
- Client-side only (no server installation required)
- Many features scale based on server-side mod support
- Always follow the rules of the server you play on

---

**All of Utility 2** prioritizes **precision, information, and adaptability**  
over vanilla balance.
